narrative:
Hamilton Twp I (precinct in Warren County) has 1,123 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
